title: Wave Plan
description: Output of the plan-analyzer agent. Defines waves of file-disjoint dev tasks (max 6 per wave). `rationale` and `complexity_signals` are emitted only when verbose mode is enabled.

source_plan.description: Path to the input plan.md file

rationale.description: Verbose mode only. Why these tasks belong together in this wave. Pre-1.13.0 artifacts uncapped.

task_excerpt_lines.description: Line range in source_plan, 1-indexed inclusive, e.g. '45-62'. Dev agents read this range from source_plan rather than receiving the prose inline.

complexity_signals.description: Verbose mode only. Observations about inference confidence (e.g., 'file path inferred'). Pre-1.13.0 artifacts uncapped.

role.description: TDD role. Omitted on classic (non-TDD) runs.

testable.description: TDD mode only. True for test-author/impl agents, false for non-testable standalone tasks.

non_testable_reason.description: TDD mode only. One-line reason a standalone task was classified non-testable.

tests_to_satisfy.description: impl role only. Test files (from the paired test-author) the implementation must make pass.

token_usage.description: Analyzer's token self-report: the most recent usage figure the harness surfaced to it in-band (e.g. a token-budget system warning), or null when none appeared. A lower bound, never an estimate. Used by the orchestrator as a fallback when the analyzer's completion result carries no usage figure. Optional for back-compat with wave plans written before 1.11.0.
